rationale: The citing paper is an empirical psychometric comparison of chronic regulatory focus measures, while the cited paper is a conceptual review on regulatory fit mechanisms and boundary conditions, suggesting possible but not clearly direct methodological dependence. Given this sparse evidence, it is not safe to drop, but strength for keeping is also limited.
